user.title: Entity Assistant
user.description: Add Entity Assistant. This provides services, a button, and an HTTP endpoint for exporting your entities, devices, and areas to CSV. No configuration is required.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Entity Assistant is already configured. Only a single instance is needed.

export_csv.name: Export to CSV
export_csv.description: Export entities, devices, or areas from the registry to a CSV file inside the configuration directory.

filename.name: Filename
filename.description: File to write, relative to the config directory. Must stay inside the config directory.

export_type.name: Export type
export_type.description: What to export: one row per entity, device, or area.

only_enabled.name: Only enabled
only_enabled.description: Exclude everything disabled or hidden (overrides the include options).

domains.name: Domains
domains.description: Only include entities in these domains (entities export type only).

areas.name: Areas
areas.description: Only include rows in these areas (by area id or name).

get_download_url.name: Get download URL
get_download_url.description: Return a signed, time-limited URL to download the export directly from a browser. Response only; writes no file.

expires.name: Expires (seconds)
expires.description: How long the signed URL stays valid.

export_type.name: Export type
export_type.description: What to export: one row per entity, device, or area.

only_enabled.name: Only enabled
only_enabled.description: Exclude everything disabled or hidden (overrides the include options).

domains.name: Domains
domains.description: Only include entities in these domains (entities export type only).

areas.name: Areas
areas.description: Only include rows in these areas (by area id or name).
